name: Vero Track REST API
description: Vero's Track REST API v2.0 lets you create, update and manage users, track events, and manage subscription status and tags. The API is very stable - v2.0 was released prior to 2016 with no breaking changes since. Unless otherwise specified, request data should be passed as JSON objects via POST.
